title: funckia hastata
intro: Funckia hastata, also known as prickly poppy, is a plant species in the Papaveraceae family, characterized by its hairy stems and small, greenish-yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating pain and swelling. The health benefits of Funckia hastata include relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory issues, such as coughs and sore throats. Funckia hastata is typically prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used internally to harness its medicinal properties.
